name: SmartBear MCP
description: MCP server for AI access to SmartBear tools, including BugSnag, PactFlow, QMetry, Reflect, Swagger, Zephyr and QTM4J.

BEARQ_API_TOKEN.title: BearQ API Token
BEARQ_API_TOKEN.description: BearQ workspace API token. Leave empty to disable BearQ tools. Learn more: https://developer.smartbear.com/smartbear-mcp/docs/bearq-integration

BEARQ_API_BASE_URL.title: BearQ API Base URL
BEARQ_API_BASE_URL.description: Override the BearQ public API base URL (optional). Defaults to https://api.bearq.smartbear.com

BUGSNAG_AUTH_TOKEN.title: BugSnag Auth Token
BUGSNAG_AUTH_TOKEN.description: BugSnag auth token. Leave empty to disable BugSnag tools. Learn more: https://developer.smartbear.com/smartbear-mcp/docs/bugsnag-integration

BUGSNAG_ENDPOINT.title: BugSnag Endpoint
BUGSNAG_ENDPOINT.description: BugSnag endpoint URL. (optional; only needed if using a custom BugSnag endpoint). Learn more: https://developer.smartbear.com/smartbear-mcp/docs/bugsnag-integration#custom-endpoints

BUGSNAG_PROJECT_API_KEY.title: BugSnag Project API Key
BUGSNAG_PROJECT_API_KEY.description: BugSnag project API key (optional; narrows interactions to a single project). Learn more: https://developer.smartbear.com/smartbear-mcp/docs/bugsnag-integration

COLLABORATOR_BASE_URL.title: Collaborator Base URL
COLLABORATOR_BASE_URL.description: Collaborator server base URL. Learn more: https://developer.smartbear.com/smartbear-mcp/docs/collaborator-integration

COLLABORATOR_LOGIN_TICKET.title: Collaborator Login Ticket
COLLABORATOR_LOGIN_TICKET.description: Collaborator login ticket for authentication. Learn more: https://developer.smartbear.com/smartbear-mcp/docs/collaborator-integration

COLLABORATOR_USERNAME.title: Collaborator Username
COLLABORATOR_USERNAME.description: Collaborator username for authentication. Learn more: https://developer.smartbear.com/smartbear-mcp/docs/collaborator-integration

PACT_BROKER_BASE_URL.title: Pact Broker Base URL
PACT_BROKER_BASE_URL.description: PactFlow/Pact Broker base URL. Leave empty to disable Pact tools. Learn more: https://developer.smartbear.com/smartbear-mcp/docs/contract-testing-with-pactflow

PACT_BROKER_PASSWORD.title: Pact Broker Password
PACT_BROKER_PASSWORD.description: Pact Broker password (alternative to token). Learn more: https://developer.smartbear.com/smartbear-mcp/docs/contract-testing-with-pactflow

PACT_BROKER_USERNAME.title: Pact Broker Username
PACT_BROKER_USERNAME.description: Pact Broker username (alternative to token). Learn more: https://developer.smartbear.com/smartbear-mcp/docs/contract-testing-with-pactflow

QMETRY_API_KEY.title: QMetry API Key
QMETRY_API_KEY.description: QMetry API key for authentication. Leave empty to disable QMetry tools. Learn more: https://developer.smartbear.com/smartbear-mcp/docs/qmetry-integration

QMETRY_BASE_URL.title: QMetry Base URL
QMETRY_BASE_URL.description: Optional QMetry base URL for custom or region-specific endpoints. Learn more: https://developer.smartbear.com/smartbear-mcp/docs/qmetry-integration

REFLECT_API_TOKEN.title: Reflect API Token
REFLECT_API_TOKEN.description: Reflect API token. Leave empty to disable Reflect tools. Learn more: https://developer.smartbear.com/smartbear-mcp/docs/reflect-integration

SWAGGER_API_KEY.title: Swagger API Key
SWAGGER_API_KEY.description: Swagger API key. Leave empty to disable Swagger tools. Learn more: https://developer.smartbear.com/smartbear-mcp/docs/swagger-portal-integration

SWAGGER_PORTAL_BASE_PATH.title: SwaggerHub Portal Base Path
SWAGGER_PORTAL_BASE_PATH.description: Base path for Portal API requests (optional). Learn more: https://developer.smartbear.com/smartbear-mcp/docs/swagger-portal-integration

SWAGGER_REGISTRY_BASE_PATH.title: SwaggerHub Registry Base Path
SWAGGER_REGISTRY_BASE_PATH.description: Base path for Registry API requests (optional). Learn more: https://developer.smartbear.com/smartbear-mcp/docs/swagger-portal-integration

SWAGGER_UI_BASE_PATH.title: SwaggerHub UI Base Path
SWAGGER_UI_BASE_PATH.description: Base URL for the SwaggerHub UI (optional). Learn more: https://developer.smartbear.com/smartbear-mcp/docs/swagger-portal-integration

ZEPHYR_API_TOKEN.title: Zephyr API Token
ZEPHYR_API_TOKEN.description: The Zephyr Cloud API token for authentication. Learn more: https://support.smartbear.com/zephyr/docs/en/rest-api/api-access-tokens-management.html

ZEPHYR_BASE_URL.title: Zephyr Base URL
ZEPHYR_BASE_URL.description: The Zephyr Cloud API base url. Should be changed depending on the region of your Jira instance. Learn more: https://support.smartbear.com/zephyr-scale-cloud/api-docs/#section/Authentication/Accessing-the-API

QTM4J_API_KEY.title: QTM4J API key
QTM4J_API_KEY.description: QTM4J (QMetry Test Management for Jira) API key. Leave empty to disable QTM4J tools. Learn more: https://developer.smartbear.com/smartbear-mcp/docs/qtm4j-integration

QTM4J_BASE_URL.title: QTM4J Base URL
QTM4J_BASE_URL.description: QTM4J base URL (optional). Defaults to https://qtmcloud.qmetry.com. Override when using a self-hosted or region-specific instance.
